heading: Applicability of consumer protection provisions
label: 3805 Applicability of consumer protection provisions
text: Section 501(c)(1) of the Depository Institutions Deregulation and Monetary Control Act of 1980 shall not apply to transactions which are subject to this chapter.
notes: References in TextSection 501(c)(1) of the Depository Institutions Deregulation and Monetary Control Act of 1980, referred to in text, is , title V, , , which is set out as a note under .section 501(c)(1) of Pub. L. 96–22194 Stat. 161section 1735f–7 of this titleMar. 31, 1980
